metadata.notes: Scoped flow stars (流耀) from iztro@2.5.8 getHoroscopeStar(stem, branch, scope). Each case lists the ten matrix stars (魁钺昌曲禄羊陀马鸾喜) by base and branch; the yearly scope also records 年解. Placement depends only on the period stem-branch. Cases cover all ten stems and twelve branches across every scope. Palace index 0 is 寅.
